title: Admin System Maintenance Response
description: Current maintenance-mode state for THIS instance (mirrors @selfhelp/shared ISystemMaintenance). Never contains secrets.

enabled.description: Whether maintenance mode is active (env hard switch OR the admin-toggled file).

forced_by_env.description: True when SELFHELP_MAINTENANCE_MODE forces it on; the CMS cannot disable it.

message.description: Operator-facing note shown while in maintenance.

since.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the file-backed state was last enabled, or empty.

updated_by.description: Actor id that last changed the file-backed state (e.g. 'user:42'), or empty.

safe_mode.description: Read-only plugin safe-mode flag, surfaced for the operator.
